---
id: api-keys-controller-expire
title: "Expire an API key"
description: "Expire an API key immediately, schedule a future expiration, or clear a scheduled future expiration."

hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Expire an API key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api_keys/{id}/expire"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Expire an API key immediately, schedule a future expiration, or clear a scheduled future expiration.
